title: Pre-Matric Scholarship (SC/ST/PwD) — Renewal Registration
blurb: Renew a pre-matric scholarship and view its application status.

steps.narration: Click 'Pre Matric Scholarship Services' to open the pre-matric options.

target_hint: Prematric Scholarships For SC/ST/BC Renewal Registration
steps.narration: Under 'Prematric Scholarships For SC/ST/BC Renewal Registration', click 'Registration'.
Enter your Previous Application Id, then click the highlighted button to view your renewal status.
